ucs.title: [LLM] DragonForce affiliate SimpleHelp RMM exploitation chain (CVE-2024-57727) → suspicious child process
ucs.description: Hunts for the DragonForce intrusion chain reported by Sophos MDR (May 2025) where an MSP's SimpleHelp RMM (vulnerable to CVE-2024-57727/57726/57728) was abused to push reconnaissance, credential collection and ransomware to downstream customers. Detects SimpleHelp service binaries spawning interactive/scripting children — the hallmark handoff between exploited RMM and DragonForce hands-on-keyboard activity.
ucs.splunk: | tstats `security_content_summariesonly` count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as process values(Processes.process_name) as process_name values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("SimpleService.exe","Remote Access.exe","SimpleHelp.exe","JWrapper-Remote Access.exe") OR Processes.parent_process="*\\SimpleHelp\\*" OR Processes.parent_process="*\\JWrapper-Remote Access\\*") (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","whoami.exe","nltest.exe","quser.exe","systeminfo.exe","ipconfig.exe","wmic.exe","reg.exe","taskkill.exe","sc.exe","rundll32.exe","mshta.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","curl.exe","wget.exe")) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.parent_process Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.process_id Processes.parent_process_id | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)` | where user!="SYSTEM" OR process IN ("*whoami*","*nltest*","*net group*","*net localgroup*")
ucs.kql:
// DragonForce — SimpleHelp RMM abused as initial-access proxy (CVE-2024-57727 chain)
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let SimpleHelpParents = dynamic(["simpleservice.exe","simplehelp.exe","remote access.exe","jwrapper-remote access.exe","jwrapper-windows-32-bit.exe","jwrapper-windows-64-bit.exe"]);
let HandsOnChildren  = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","whoami.exe","nltest.exe","quser.exe","systeminfo.exe","ipconfig.exe","wmic.exe","reg.exe","taskkill.exe","sc.exe","rundll32.exe","mshta.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","curl.exe","wget.exe","7z.exe","rclone.exe","psexec.exe","psexec64.exe"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (SimpleHelpParents)
     or InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (@"\SimpleHelp\", @"\JWrapper-Remote Access\")
| where FileName in~ (HandsOnChildren)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          Parent      = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentPath  = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          ParentCmd   = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          Child       = FileName,
          ChildCmd    = ProcessCommandLine,
          ChildSHA256 = SHA256,
          IsRemote    = InitiatingProcessAccountName
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// DragonForce — SimpleHelp RMM abused as initial-access proxy
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let HandsOnChildren = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","whoami.exe","nltest.exe","quser.exe","systeminfo.exe","ipconfig.exe","wmic.exe","reg.exe","taskkill.exe","sc.exe","rundll32.exe","mshta.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","curl.exe","wget.exe","7z.exe","rclone.exe","psexec.exe","psexec64.exe"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where ParentProcessName has_any ("SimpleService.exe","SimpleHelp.exe","Remote Access.exe","JWrapper-Remote Access.exe","JWrapper-Windows-32-Bit.exe","JWrapper-Windows-64-Bit.exe")
     or ParentProcessName has_any (@"\SimpleHelp\", @"\JWrapper-Remote Access\")
| extend ChildLeaf = tostring(split(NewProcessName, '\\')[-1])
| where tolower(ChildLeaf) in (HandsOnChildren)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
          ParentProcessName, NewProcessName, CommandLine, TokenElevationType
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: DragonForce SimpleHelp RMM Spawning Recon or Scripting Children
id: 9c3f2d11-7a4d-4b3e-bf78-91dd2d3f8a01
status: experimental
description: Detects SimpleHelp RMM service binaries (abused by DragonForce affiliates via CVE-2024-57727/57726/57728) spawning recon, scripting, or LOLBin children — the canonical handoff from exploited RMM to hands-on-keyboard activity.
references:
  - https://news.sophos.com/en-us/2025/05/27/a-dragonforce-of-one-mspr-pwn-2/
  - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-57727
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2025/05/30
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_parent:
    ParentImage|contains:
      - '\SimpleHelp\\'
      - '\JWrapper-Remote Access\\'
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\SimpleService.exe'
      - '\SimpleHelp.exe'
      - '\Remote Access.exe'
      - '\JWrapper-Remote Access.exe'
  selection_child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\net.exe'
      - '\net1.exe'
      - '\whoami.exe'
      - '\nltest.exe'
      - '\quser.exe'
      - '\wmic.exe'
      - '\reg.exe'
      - '\taskkill.exe'
      - '\sc.exe'
      - '\rundll32.exe'
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\certutil.exe'
      - '\bitsadmin.exe'
      - '\rclone.exe'
      - '\psexec.exe'
      - '\psexec64.exe'
  condition: 1 of selection_parent and selection_child
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate MSP technician interactive sessions — baseline known operator command lines and exclude
level: high
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.t1190
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1059.003
ucs.rationale: DragonForce was the first ransomware crew publicly reported (Sophos MDR, May 2025) using the SimpleHelp CVE-2024-57727 LFI / CVE-2024-57726 priv-esc / CVE-2024-57728 RCE chain to pivot from a compromised MSP into multiple downstream customer estates. Most ransomware actors don't pivot through SimpleHelp; this parent set + hands-on-keyboard child combo is essentially actor-specific in 2025.

ucs.title: [LLM] DragonForce LockBit/Conti-derived pre-encryption sequence: shadow-copy wipe + service kill + Defender tamper within minutes
ucs.description: DragonForce uses a customised LockBit Black (3.0) builder leak and a Conti v3 fork as its locker. Both share a tight, scripted pre-encryption preparation sequence — vssadmin/wmic shadow deletion, mass service stop (SQL/Veeam/AV), bcdedit recovery disable, and Defender tamper — typically all within ~5 minutes on the same host before T1486 fires. This UC fires when ≥3 of those preparation steps land on one host within 5 minutes.
ucs.splunk: | tstats `security_content_summariesonly` count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as process values(Processes.process_name) as process_name values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.user!="*$" ((Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" Processes.process="*delete*shadows*") OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" Processes.process="*shadowcopy*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" (Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*No*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy*ignoreallfailures*")) OR (Processes.process_name="wbadmin.exe" Processes.process="*delete*catalog*") OR (Processes.process_name="net.exe" Processes.process="*stop*" (Processes.process="*sql*" OR Processes.process="*veeam*" OR Processes.process="*backup*" OR Processes.process="*exchange*")) OR (Processes.process_name="sc.exe" Processes.process="*config*" Processes.process="*start=*disabled*") OR (Processes.process_name="taskkill.exe" (Processes.process="*sql*" OR Processes.process="*veeam*" OR Processes.process="*backup*" OR Processes.process="*defender*")) OR (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") (Processes.process="*Set-MpPreference*DisableRealtimeMonitoring*" OR Processes.process="*Remove-MpPreference*" OR Processes.process="*Uninstall-WindowsFeature*Defender*" OR Processes.process="*Stop-Service*"))) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process _time | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | eval bucket=floor(_time/300) | stats dc(process_name) as distinct_techniques values(process_name) as techniques values(process) as commands values(_time) as times by dest user bucket | where distinct_techniques>=3 | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
// DragonForce pre-encryption sequence — vssadmin / bcdedit / service-kill / Defender-tamper within 5 min
let LookbackHours = 24h;
let WindowMin = 5m;
let TaggedSteps = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackHours)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | extend Step = case(
        FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe"   and ProcessCommandLine has "delete" and ProcessCommandLine has "shadows",       "ShadowDelete_vssadmin",
        FileName =~ "wmic.exe"       and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"),                          "ShadowDelete_wmic",
        FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe"    and (ProcessCommandLine has_all ("recoveryenabled","no") or ProcessCommandLine has_all ("bootstatuspolicy","ignoreallfailures")), "RecoveryDisable_bcdedit",
        FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe"    and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","catalog"),                             "BackupCatalogWipe_wbadmin",
        FileName in~ ("net.exe","net1.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has "stop" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("sql","veeam","backup","exchange","vmms","mssql","sophos","sentinel"), "ServiceStop_net",
        FileName =~ "sc.exe"         and ProcessCommandLine has "config" and ProcessCommandLine has "disabled",        "ServiceDisable_sc",
        FileName =~ "taskkill.exe"   and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("sql","veeam","backup","defender","sense","sophos","sentinel","crowdstrike"), "ProcessKill_taskkill",
        FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Set-MpPreference","Remove-MpPreference","Uninstall-WindowsFeature -Name Windows-Defender","DisableRealtimeMonitoring","DisableBehaviorMonitoring","DisableIntrusionPreventionSystem"), "DefenderTamper_powershell",
        "")
    | where Step != "";
TaggedSteps
| summarize StepCount = dcount(Step),
            Steps     = make_set(Step),
            Cmds      = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 16),
            Users     = make_set(AccountName),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen  = max(Timestamp)
            by DeviceName, bin(Timestamp, WindowMin)
| where StepCount >= 3                                     // ≥3 distinct prep techniques in 5 min
| extend DurationSec = datetime_diff('second', LastSeen, FirstSeen)
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// DragonForce pre-encryption sequence — Sentinel SecurityEvent 4688 variant
let LookbackHours = 24h;
let WindowMin = 5m;
let TaggedSteps = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackHours)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend Img = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, '\\')[-1])),
             CL  = tolower(CommandLine)
    | extend Step = case(
        Img == "vssadmin.exe"  and CL has "delete" and CL has "shadows",                     "ShadowDelete_vssadmin",
        Img == "wmic.exe"      and CL has "shadowcopy" and CL has "delete",                  "ShadowDelete_wmic",
        Img == "bcdedit.exe"   and (CL has "recoveryenabled no" or CL has "bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"), "RecoveryDisable_bcdedit",
        Img == "wbadmin.exe"   and CL has "delete" and CL has "catalog",                     "BackupCatalogWipe_wbadmin",
        Img in ("net.exe","net1.exe") and CL has "stop" and (CL has "sql" or CL has "veeam" or CL has "backup" or CL has "exchange" or CL has "sophos" or CL has "sentinel"), "ServiceStop_net",
        Img == "sc.exe"        and CL has "config" and CL has "disabled",                    "ServiceDisable_sc",
        Img == "taskkill.exe"  and (CL has "sql" or CL has "veeam" or CL has "backup" or CL has "defender" or CL has "sense" or CL has "sophos" or CL has "crowdstrike"), "ProcessKill_taskkill",
        Img in ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and (CL has "set-mppreference" or CL has "remove-mppreference" or CL has "disablerealtimemonitoring" or CL has "uninstall-windowsfeature -name windows-defender"), "DefenderTamper_powershell",
        "")
    | where Step != "";
TaggedSteps
| summarize StepCount = dcount(Step),
            Steps     = make_set(Step),
            Cmds      = make_set(CommandLine, 16),
            Users     = make_set(Account),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen  = max(TimeGenerated)
            by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, WindowMin)
| where StepCount >= 3
| extend DurationSec = datetime_diff('second', LastSeen, FirstSeen)
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: DragonForce's locker is built from leaked LockBit 3.0 (Black) and Conti v3 source — both encyptors hard-code the same scripted prep sequence (shadow wipe → service kill → bcdedit → Defender tamper) that the operator triggers via a single batch/PS dropper before T1486. Counting ≥3 of these distinct techniques on one host inside a 5-minute window is essentially pathognomonic for LockBit-derived rans
